caption: A motion graphic video features a dark, stylized digital background with glowing cyan network nodes and lines. The sequence begins with the text "THE TECHNOLOGY INSIDER" centered against this digital backdrop. The scene then transitions to a plain white screen featuring a small, central logo, followed by a return to the digital background with "THE TECHNOLOGY INSIDER" again. This is followed by a white screen displaying "TFNN.com EDUCATING INVESTORS" above a large, cyan-colored price of "$37.50". The visual pattern repeats, showing "THE TECHNOLOGY INSIDER" on the digital background, followed by the white screen with "TFNN.com EDUCATING INVESTORS" and "$37.50". In the later iterations of the digital background scenes, a bright cyan "SIGN UP" button appears below the main text. No people or physical locations are present in the video.
